name: ek-design
description: Eric Kazmaier's personal cyberpunk brand stack — composable Claude Code plugins that compile a single brand SSoT (design-model.yaml) into Neo-Tokyo-neon themed agentic UI surfaces. Architecturally inherited from ejkaz/parspec-design.

plugins.name: ek-design
plugins.description: Brand SSoT skill. Maintains ek-design design-model.yaml (Neo-Tokyo neon palette, typography, motion, voice, invariants) and operates inspect / evolve / roll back. Versioned via YAML frontmatter and git tags so brand evolution is mechanical, not manual. First consumer: cepsra (cepsr.app).

plugins.name: ek-web
plugins.description: ek-web token exporter. Reads design-model.yaml from the ek-design plugin and emits consumable token files for web codebases: Tailwind v4 config (tailwind-tokens.ts), shadcn theme CSS variables (shadcn-theme.css), and flat CSS variables (ek-tokens.css). Brand evolution → re-run → downstream apps pick up new tokens.

plugins.name: ek-craft
plugins.description: ek-craft brand-compliance lint. Data-driven Python linter reads design-model.yaml from the sibling ek-design plugin (avoid list, primary axis, invariants) and applies them to .tsx / .jsx / .css / .html targets. Plus universal anti-AI-slop rules adapted for cyberpunk web UI. Catches Tailwind indigo/violet, costume cyberpunk fonts, drop-shadow-as-elevation, glassmorphism heavy blur, hex literals where role tokens exist, magenta CTA monopoly violations, mono-for-identifiers misses.
